import io,re,urllib.request,zipfile
pat=re.compile(rb'FLAG\\{["'^}]+'"\\}')
seen=set()

def scan_zip_bytes(data, path='root.zip'):
    z=zipfile.ZipFile(io.BytesIO(data))
    for n in z.namelist():
        full=f'{path}:{n}'
        if full in seen: continue
        seen.add(full)
        b=z.read(n)
        m=pat.search(b)
        if m:
            print('FOUND',m.group().decode(), 'IN', full)
            return m.group().decode()
        if n.lower().endswith('.zip'):
